status: R0 official HP Z2 LM Studio/Vulkan smoke matrix config
_scope: Light smoke only. This config is not a RAG Phase 2 heavy eval config.
_canonical_workspace: Main PC keeps source-of-truth docs, commits, and pushes. HP Z2 is execution-only runner.
_measurement_policy: All models are equal candidates in this smoke matrix.
Use the same load profile: lms load <model> --gpu max --context-length 4096 --ttl 120.
Use non-interactive lms CLI confirmation: -y. This avoids the gpt-oss 20B/120B multiple-match prompt during estimate/load.
Use one prompt with temperature=0.0 and max_tokens=512.
Record load_s, api_wall_s, completion_tokens, total_tokens, raw tok/s, visible output, and errors.
Do not reuse earlier 5080, subpc, or Ollama speeds as official HP Z2 baseline values.
gpt-oss-120b Ollama/ROCm failure remains backend-specific and must not be treated as LM Studio failure.
Qwen35/Gemma hidden or thinking token overhead is expected to be possible; raw token throughput and visible output should be interpreted separately.

models.label: hpz2-lms-gemma-4-31b
models._role: secondary dense quality/safety wording comparison candidate

models.label: hpz2-lms-gpt-oss-120b
models._role: large model viability candidate; LM Studio/Vulkan lane only
